name: Progress
description: Linear progress bar — a slim horizontal track that previews how far a long-running task has advanced. Two modes share one anatomy: determinate (a filled segment at the value's ratio) and indeterminate (a sliding segment that animates left-to-right). Two appearances on a single emphasis axis: `default` (a `primary` indicator on a `surfaceContainerHighest` track — the canonical progress) and `accent` (same recipe, but the indicator paints in a brand-accent tone for high-emphasis onboarding rungs). Two sizes — `sm` (2px track) and `md` (4px track). Single-spec family.
useCases: long-running task progress on a screen header
